# server-build-id

Server-only leaf that reads the `.build-id` baked into the served frontend
bundle (`${WEB_DIST_DIR}/.build-id`) once and memoizes it. Extracted out from
behind the heavy `build/server` barrel so stale-tab detection can read the build
id without pulling `git-watcher`/`worktree` into its closure. Its only dependency
is `infra/paths`; a synchronous, boot-safe read (reports' boot-time backfill
reads it eagerly).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Server build-id leaf: reads the .build-id baked into the served bundle. A leaf so stale-tab detection reads it without importing the heavy build barrel (which pulls git-watcher/worktree).
- Server:
  - Uses: `infra/paths.WEB_DIST_DIR`
  - Exports: Values: `getServerBuildId`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `build`, `reports`, `reports/crash`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
